## Checklist
- [ ] If I touched `Invoke-PressureTest.ps1` or `Test-Sensitivity.ps1`, I ran `pwsh pressure-test/tests/Run-DetectorTests.ps1` and it passed (exit 0).
- [ ] No real secrets, credentials, or personal data added (test fixtures use published fake values only).
- [ ] Docs/EXPLAINER updated if behavior changed, and nothing overclaims what's enforced.
